corrected_hover_or_pending_reason: pending: مِن needs particle/preposition function and jar-majrur attachment review; it must not be certified through the verb مَنَّ entry candidate
drill_prompt: Compare مِن, مَنْ, and ٱلْمَنَّ. Which one is a preposition, which one is a function token, and which one is a noun?
learner_explanation: The word مِن contributes a prepositional relation such as from. It is not the verb مَنَّ.
nahw_lesson: مِن is a preposition; its hover trust depends on function and attachment, not root-family evidence.
sarf_lesson: Strict surface and POS block a verb-entry candidate from certifying a particle token.
what_failed: A function-token row entered a verb-entry tranche and looked populated because the English string was readable.

corrected_hover_or_pending_reason: pending: مَنْ must be classified as relative, interrogative, or conditional by exact context before a hover can propagate
drill_prompt: For quran:2:97:2, name the function of مَنْ and explain why مِن evidence cannot certify it.
learner_explanation: The fatḥa in مَنْ and the clause after it make it a function word, not the preposition مِن.
nahw_lesson: The clause decides whether مَنْ means who, whoever, or another function.
sarf_lesson: Do not merge مَنْ, مِن, and ٱلْمَنَّ under one stripped root or source key.
what_failed: A strict-surface function token shared a candidate lane with مِن and مَنَّ-like entry evidence.

corrected_hover_or_pending_reason: pending: ثَمَرَةٍ is a noun token and needs noun role/case review; do not certify it from أَثْمَرَ verb evidence
drill_prompt: Classify ثَمَرَةٍ and أَثْمَرَ by POS and explain why their hovers cannot be shared.
learner_explanation: ثَمَرَةٍ is a noun meaning a fruit, not the verb to bear fruit.
nahw_lesson: The local partitive/governed nominal context decides how the noun contributes.
sarf_lesson: Noun shape and case/state outrank the verb entry family when the token is a fruit noun.
what_failed: A lexical noun row was reviewed through a verb-entry candidate family.

corrected_hover_or_pending_reason: pending: ٱشْتَرَوُا needs exact form/context selection before an authored hover such as bought/sold/traded can be certified
drill_prompt: For ٱشْتَرَوُا in quran:2:16:3, identify why a slash gloss is not learner-safe.
learner_explanation: The written verb has one contribution in the verse; the hover should not show every dictionary option.
nahw_lesson: The object/context decides which English verb is appropriate; a slash list is not a hover.
sarf_lesson: Record the finite form and morphology before picking a trade-family sense.
visible_bad_hover: to sell, buy, or trade depending on form
what_failed: A finite verb token inherited an omnibus contronym entry gloss instead of a token contribution.

corrected_hover_or_pending_reason: pending: حَوْلَهُۥ must account for the lexical/adverbial host and هُ suffix before rich certification
drill_prompt: Segment حَوْلَهُۥ into host and suffix, then explain why host-only around is incomplete.
learner_explanation: The ending هُ means him/it and must be visible in the explanation.
nahw_lesson: The suffix referent and attachment decide whether the English is around it, around him, or another contextual phrase.
sarf_lesson: Segment the host and suffix even for adverbial/nominal rows.
what_failed: A readable host gloss hid the attached pronoun contribution.
